ladder_decisions.requirement: The envelope has no thumbnail or display-mesh record. Fixed-card framing, document kind, and Global metadata are the complete native L0 content.
Explicit B-rep records produce shared body-to-vertex topology. Face-local trimming records produce connected sheet regions without inferred cross-face adjacency.
The envelope has no ordered feature-operation history or replayable sketch history.
The envelope has no complete parametric constraint, expression, configuration, and re-derivable feature system.
The envelope has product definitions and occurrences but no assembly-mate constraint model.
